brand.name: Classic Design Services
brand.tagline: The one-stop source for all your transit, installation, and warehousing needs

offer.what: White-glove moving, receiving, warehouse storage, delivery, installation, crating, and fine art handling services for interior designers, trade professionals, businesses, and homeowners — Atlanta-based with nationwide reach.
offer.coreOutcome: Valuable possessions and fine furnishings arrive undamaged, on time, and perfectly installed so interior designers and clients never have to worry about logistics.
offer.pricePoint: Custom quotes only; no published pricing. Mid-to-high range given white-glove positioning, specialized handling, and 100,000 sq ft climate-controlled facility.
offer.commitment: Per-project / one-off engagements; evolves into ongoing retainer-like relationships with trade clients (designers, manufacturers, showrooms).

audience.icp: Interior designers and design trade professionals (Atlanta, GA and surrounding region) who need a single trusted logistics partner for receiving, storing, and installing high-value furnishings, antiques, and fine art for client projects.
painPoints: Damaged or delayed deliveries ruining a client installation
No climate-controlled storage for staged or overflow items
Unreliable standard movers unfamiliar with fine furnishings and art
Managing multiple vendors across a single project
No single accountable point of contact for end-to-end logistics
segments: Builders & remodelers needing staging/storage during construction
Manufacturers & showrooms needing overflow storage and delivery
Museums & galleries requiring fine art installation and handling
Film & entertainment productions needing on-set item management

salesCycle.length: Days to a few weeks for residential; weeks to months to establish ongoing trade relationships
salesCycle.trial: No trial; free estimates via online form or phone call
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Quote request (web form or phone) → estimate delivered via email/phone → booked job
salesCycle.topObjection: Uncertainty about cost and whether the white-glove premium is justified over a standard moving company

ahaMoment: The first flawless installation — when a designer sees their client's high-value items arrive damage-free, on schedule, and perfectly placed without managing a single logistics detail themselves.

retention.recurring: Yes — project-by-project relationships with design trade clients become de facto retainers; manufacturers and showrooms use them for ongoing warehousing and delivery.
retention.expansion: Receiving → storage → installation → fine art handling (CV Fine Art Services division) → furniture repair/restoration → fabric/upholstery cleaning (FabriGuard division).
retention.churnRisk: A single damaged piece or missed installation deadline can permanently end a designer relationship; word-of-mouth cuts both ways in the design trade community.

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — no apparent email sequence for new trade or residential clients
Lead-Magnet Nurture — no lead magnet exists; quote form is the only capture mechanism
Trial/Consult Conversion — no structured follow-up sequence after estimate requests
Value Newsletter — no visible educational content, tips, or newsletter for the design trade
Renewal / Anniversary & Expansion — no proactive outreach to past clients for repeat or expanded services
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — no visible re-engagement campaign for lapsed relationships
Referral / Advocacy — no structured program despite referrals being a key growth channel (designers refer clients)
toneVoice: Professional and authoritative with a warm, reassuring quality. Communicates trust, expertise, and meticulous care. Not stuffy — approachable yet clearly premium. Centers messaging on reliability, peace of mind, and protecting what clients value most.
compliance: CAN-SPAM / standard email compliance applies. No HIPAA, financial, or legal special requirements identified. Serves general public and B2B trade — standard opt-out and list hygiene practices apply.
